WEBINAR FUNNEL FORMULA / MODULE 3 / ASSIGNMENT
HOW TO USE THIS PDF
• 	The first time you open this PDF (from the link in the email, it will open
in your browser)
• 	Do not attempt to fill out the PDF in your browser; it will not save
• 	Instead, download the file to your own computer
• 	Then, open the file using a PDF reader
• 	Fill out the PDF, then click Save
• 	Follow the instructions below to post your work to the Facebook
group.

WEBINAR FUNNEL FORMULA / MODULE 3 / ASSIGNMENT
YOUR ASSIGNMENT
Post a link to your thank you page or a screenshot of your webinar
attendance email grid.
STEP #1
Decide on whether you will post a link to your thank you page or a screenshot
of your webinar attendance email grid (Step #2).
STEP #2
Complete the Webinar Attendance Email Grid (see next page). For more on
this topic see Module 3; in particular Lessons 2, 3 and 5.
STEP #3
On Saturday, you’ll see a post in the Webinar Funnel Formula Facebook group
with the following graphic. Post your assignment as a comment under this
graphic by 11:00 am ET July 22th:
